title: A Seedless Place
body:
# A Seedless Place
Removes the need for Seed items in Minecraft by making it so crops can be planted directly into Farmland instead! 
This is done through a very straightforward config file, where you simply put the item you want to replicate the functionality of a seed in the first section, and then the seed you want it to replicate in the second section. The only item this doesn't work for in vanilla, to our recollection, is with Pumpkins - But this can be solved by using Pumpkin slices from Farmer's Delight instead if you're willing to work on the configuration for a while! Made for the upcoming Stripped MC modpack. Hope you enjoy!
